title: Newly-announced Republican legislation will fight retail theft, ease the burden of regulations, avert a small-business tax increase and give consumers a sales tax holiday.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's business environment ranks among the worst in the nation.",
    "Small businesses are struggling to stay alive with the burdens of excessive taxation and regulation.",
    "California has become a very challenging place to raise your family and run a business.",
    "Retail theft is particularly devastating to NFIB’s small business members whose ability to absorb inventory losses is razor thin.",
```
